action.description: Which Gmail tool to execute: create_draft, send_message, search, get_message, get_thread

to.description: Recipient email address (for create_draft or send_message)

subject.description: Email subject line (for create_draft or send_message)

body.description: Email body content (for create_draft or send_message)

query.description: Search query string for Gmail messages (for search)

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return (for search)

message_id.description: Unique Gmail message ID to retrieve (for get_message)

thread_id.description: Unique Gmail thread ID to retrieve (for get_thread)
